items.final_wording: Supports patient and collateral history, cognitive, behavioural and psychological symptoms, daily-life impact, physical and neurological examination, appropriate blood or urine tests, validated cognitive tools, functional informant tools, reversible causes, rapid progression, and specialist assessment.

source.title: Dementia: assessment, management and support for people living with dementia and their carers
source.population: Adults with suspected or diagnosed dementia and their carers.
source.setting: Initial assessment, specialist assessment, ongoing care coordination, and support.
source.exclusions: Exact for adult memory and cognitive concern assessment and support; partial for undifferentiated memory symptoms and not directly validated for UAE referral, driving, or social-care pathways.
source.evidence_paraphrase: Supports patient and collateral history, cognitive, behavioural and psychological symptoms, daily-life impact, physical and neurological examination, appropriate blood or urine tests, validated cognitive tools, functional informant tools, reversible causes, rapid progression, and specialist assessment.

items.rationale: The exact dementia assessment section supports cognitive, behavioural and psychological history, collateral history, daily-life impact, clinician-performed physical or neurological assessment, validated tools and reviewed investigations without diagnosing dementia.

items.final_wording: Supports flexible or prescheduled monitoring, review of emerging needs, a named coordinator, and documented care and support planning.

source.title: Dementia: assessment, management and support for people living with dementia and their carers
source.population: Adults with suspected or diagnosed dementia and their carers.

exact_location.heading: Recommendations 1.2.34–1.2.35 and 1.3.1–1.3.2 — monitoring, coordination, and support plans

source.evidence_paraphrase: Supports flexible or prescheduled monitoring, review of emerging needs, a named coordinator, and documented care and support planning.

items.rationale: The exact monitoring section supports review of emerging needs, coordination, clinician-entered plan, safety net, follow-up, and questions.
